demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My hands locked up completely tonight, the ache in my knuckles is excruciating, and I'm terrified I'm never going to be able to use them again.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain came on suddenly tonight after a really busy day using my hands, and I can't open bottles or turn doorknobs — I'm scared it's permanent.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on suddenly tonight, a few hours after an unusually busy day of manual tasks
symptom_narrative.duration: a few hours, and it hasn't let up
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, unrelenting ache in the knuckles and finger joints; my hands feel like they've seized up
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: excruciating — I can barely bend my fingers and I'm panicking
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both hands the same, mostly the big knuckles and the middle joints of my fingers
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started tonight; my fingers are always a bit stiff first thing in the morning but that usually loosens off within about half an hour
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: not much yet; a bit of paracetamol takes the edge off; warm water seems to help a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to grip or bend my fingers, and it was worse after all the hand work I did today
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: just the pain and stiffness in my hands — I don't feel sick or feverish otherwise
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had achy, stiff fingers on and off for a long time but never anything this sudden or this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't do fine tasks tonight — can't turn doorknobs or open bottles — and I live on my own so I'm worried about managing

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: on-and-off aches and stiffness in my finger joints for years
past_medical_history.how_managed: usually just rest and the occasional paracetamol

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; the acute hand pain and loss of grip tonight is making it hard to look after herself this evening

objective_data_offered.value: both hands look a bit puffy over the big knuckles and the middle finger joints; the skin colour looks normal, not red
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-held phone camera in poor evening lighting; swelling and colour are hard to judge on video

objective_data_offered.value: the sore joints don't feel hot when I touch them, just tender and stiff
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-assessment of warmth by touch is unreliable and cannot replace clinical examination

objective_data_offered.value: no fever — I don't feel hot or shivery and I haven't had chills
